summary: RIDEX backend + frontend end-to-end testing complete. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests PASS (auth register/login/me, vehicles list/filter/search/detail, bookings create+start+end, notifications, KYC, owner stats). Frontend: All critical mobile flows work — landing → signup → home (greeting, RideMiles Silver tier card, chip-all/car/bike filters, 6 vehicle cards seeded) → vehicle detail (sticky Book now) → booking screen (plan selector, duration stepper, add-ons, total ₹2,323) → Confirm & Pay (booking persisted; visible on Trips) → Start trip → End trip (RideMiles incremented from 250 → 517) → Rewards (Silver tier, perks, redeem rewards) → Profile (name, wallet ₹500, KYC row, logout). No deprecated Expo packages detected. SafeAreaView used correctly from react-native-safe-area-context.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful Confirm & Pay, RN Alert.alert is shown with 'View trip' button but the booking screen does not auto-navigate to /(tabs)/trips. User has to manually tap the alert button. Consider router.replace immediately on success and showing an in-app toast/snackbar, or auto-dismiss + navigate.

Console error 'Cannot update a component (NavigationContainerInner) while rendering a different component (Landing)'. setState/navigation triggered during render in Landing. Likely a router.replace called inside the render path instead of useEffect.

issues: Repeated console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — comes from an internal/3rd-party RN-web component but worth checking if any local component passes pointerEvents as a prop instead of within style.

action_items: Fix Landing setState-during-render warning: ensure any router.replace/navigation in app/index.tsx runs inside useEffect, not inline during render.
Optionally improve booking success UX: navigate to /(tabs)/trips programmatically after API success (before/in addition to Alert.alert) so the flow feels smoother on web/native.
Audit for any local component that passes `pointerEvents` as a prop and move it into style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }} to silence the RN-web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single 600-line file — acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth, vehicles, bookings) if it grows.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded everywhere via projections — good.

BookingCreate.add_ons typed List[str] but frontend sends an object {helmet, insurance, delivery} of booleans — backend silently ignores invalid shape because field is dropped before validation due to pydantic strict typing only when present. Frontend should send add-ons as list of keys, or backend should accept dict. (Tested as no-op currently.)
POST /api/wallet/topup uses query-style float param instead of a Pydantic body model — works but inconsistent with other endpoints; consider a body model for consistency.
JWT_SECRET defaults to a hardcoded string if env missing — fine for dev, ensure prod sets JWT_SECRET.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (signup, browse, filter, vehicle detail, booking creation, trips start/end, rewards, profile, logout)

seed_data_creation: No manual seed needed — backend auto-seeds 6 vehicles on startup. Test user qa+ridex_e2e2_<ts>@example.com was created during E2E.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://ridex-mobility-1.preview.emergentagent.com. All endpoints under /api. pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — reuse. Frontend uses Expo Router; tab routes accessible at /trips, /rewards, /profile. RN Alert.alert is NOT caught by Playwright's dialog handler (RN-web renders its own modal), so for end-to-end tests use direct router URLs after booking creation instead of waiting for navigation.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failing test. Two minor frontend warnings noted (setState-in-render in Landing; pointerEvents deprecation) for main agent to clean up.
